plugins.name: llm-wiki
plugins.description: Bootstrap and operate Karpathy-style LLM Wikis: create-llm-wiki scaffolds a new vault; use-llm-wiki ingests into / queries an existing vault from anywhere.

plugins.name: data-viz-design
plugins.description: Publication-grade plots, charts, and dashboards for expert/executive audiences (Tufte, Knaflic, Cairo, Andrews).

plugins.name: diagnose-network-latency
plugins.description: Diagnose slow/laggy/flaky internet on macOS and pinpoint the root cause (interference, congestion, signal, VPN, DNS, ISP).

plugins.name: llm-council
plugins.description: Convene a panel of model instances to pressure-test a decision or answer a question from multiple perspectives, then synthesize.

plugins.name: meal-planner
plugins.description: Weekly meal planning for the family — plan menus, save recipes, rate meals, generate grocery lists, and push them to Apple Reminders.
